description: A vibrant, fantastical digital or mixed-media composition within an ornate golden frame. The image features several stylized feminine faces with crescent-moon and circular motifs, surrounded by blue and multicolored roses. A translucent female figure appears in the upper center amid purple-pink tones. The overall palette is vivid — purples, blues, pinks, golds, and blacks. The style is highly decorative and ornamental, blending art nouveau sensibility with digital fantasy. The artist's name 'Agnes von Angelis' appears at the bottom.

_meta.title: Lilac colored epiphany of Juno Juventas
